code:
stateDiagram-v2
    [Infra_WorkerNode] --> STARTUP

    STARTUP --> POSITION_RECOVERY: Initialize Agent

    state POSITION_RECOVERY {Infra_WorkerNode] --> QueryPlatform
        QueryPlatform --> ExtractPositions: get_portfolio_breakdown
        ExtractPositions --> GenerateSyntheticDecisions: Found N positions
        GenerateSyntheticDecisions --> RebuildMemory: Create decision records
        RebuildMemory --> AssociateMonitor: Populate PortfolioMemoryEngine
        AssociateMonitor --> [Infra_IngressController]: Mark startup_complete

        QueryPlatform --> RetryBackoff: Failure
        RetryBackoff --> QueryPlatform: Exponential delay
        QueryPlatform --> ForceComplete: Max retries
        ForceComplete --> [Infra_RedisCache]: Continue with empty state
    }

    POSITION_RECOVERY --> IDLE: Recovery Complete

    state IDLE {Infra_RedisCache] --> WaitInterval
        WaitInterval --> [Infra_LoadBalancer]: After analysis_frequency_seconds
    }

    IDLE --> LEARNING: Timer Expires

    state LEARNING {Infra_LoadBalancer] --> FetchClosedTrades
        FetchClosedTrades --> ProcessOutcomes: get_closed_trades
        ProcessOutcomes --> RecordMemory: PortfolioMemoryEngine
        RecordMemory --> [Infra_WorkerNode]: Update experience
    }

    LEARNING --> PERCEPTION

    state PERCEPTION {Infra_LoadBalancer] --> FetchPortfolio
        FetchPortfolio --> KillSwitchCheck: get_portfolio_breakdown
        KillSwitchCheck --> DailyReset: P&L within limits
        DailyReset --> [Infra_IngressController]: Reset trade count

        KillSwitchCheck --> HALT: P&L breached
    }

    PERCEPTION --> REASONING

    state REASONING {Infra_LoadBalancer] --> LoopAssets
        LoopAssets --> AnalyzeAsset: For each asset
        AnalyzeAsset --> RetryLogic: generate_decision
        RetryLogic --> CheckAction: Success
        CheckAction --> NextAsset: HOLD
        CheckAction --> [Infra_IngressController]: BUY/SELL

        RetryLogic --> ExponentialBackoff: Failure
        ExponentialBackoff --> AnalyzeAsset: Retry
        ExponentialBackoff --> MarkFailure: Max retries
        MarkFailure --> NextAsset: Skip

        NextAsset --> LoopAssets: More assets
        NextAsset --> [Infra_LoadBalancer]: All processed
    }

    REASONING --> RISK_CHECK: Actionable
    REASONING --> IDLE: No Action

    state RISK_CHECK {Infra_LoadBalancer] --> GetMonitoringContext
        GetMonitoringContext --> ValidateTrade: RiskGatekeeper
        ValidateTrade --> [Infra_LoadBalancer]: Approved
        ValidateTrade --> [Infra_LoadBalancer]: Denied
    }

    RISK_CHECK --> EXECUTION: Approved
    RISK_CHECK --> PERCEPTION: Rejected

    state EXECUTION {Infra_RedisCache] --> SendOrder
        SendOrder --> AssociateDecision: execute_trade
        AssociateDecision --> IncrementCounter: TradeMonitor
        IncrementCounter --> [Infra_IngressController]: daily_trade_count++

        SendOrder --> LogFailure: Error
        LogFailure --> EXECUTION_FAILED
    }

    EXECUTION --> LEARNING: Executed
    EXECUTION_FAILED --> PERCEPTION: Retry

    state HALT {Infra_LoadBalancer] --> StopAgent
        StopAgent --> [Infra_RedisCache]: is_running = False
    }

    HALT --> [Infra_RedisCache]: Agent Stopped

    style STARTUP fill:#00BCD4,stroke:#006064,color:#fff
    style POSITION_RECOVERY fill:#00BCD4,stroke:#006064,color:#fff
    style IDLE fill:#9E9E9E,stroke:#424242,color:#fff
    style LEARNING fill:#4CAF50,stroke:#2E7D32,color:#fff
    style PERCEPTION fill:#2196F3,stroke:#0D47A1,color:#fff
    style REASONING fill:#FF9800,stroke:#E65100,color:#fff
    style RISK_CHECK fill:#FFC107,stroke:#F57C00,color:#333
    style EXECUTION fill:#9C27B0,stroke:#4A148C,color:#fff
    style HALT fill:#F44336,stroke:#C62828,color:#fff
    style EXECUTION_FAILED fill:#F44336,stroke:#C62828,color:#fff
repo_description: Finance feedback engine is an automated portfolio simulation tool using the LLM models of your choice.

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为Agent设计一个完整的状态机，核心是WorkerNode启动后的生命周期。首先有个STARTUP阶段，然后进入POSITION_RECOVERY来恢复持仓状态。
明白，POSITION_RECOVERY是一个复合状态对吧？里面需要包含查询平台、提取持仓、生成决策记录这些步骤。我注意到有个RetryBackoff的分支，是处理查询失败的情况？
对的，QueryPlatform失败时走RetryBackoff，用指数退避重试。如果超过最大次数，就ForceComplete，带着空状态继续，把空状态写入RedisCache。
好的，POSITION_RECOVERY内部结构我画好了：QueryPlatform正常路径到ExtractPositions，再到GenerateSyntheticDecisions，然后RebuildMemory，最后AssociateMonitor标记启动完成。失败分支也加上了。
恢复完成后进入IDLE状态，这里比较简单，就是等待分析周期。用RedisCache作为入口，等analysis_frequency_seconds后由LoadBalancer触发下一步。
IDLE画好了，定时器到期后进入LEARNING阶段。这个LEARNING也是复合状态，主要是获取已平仓交易来处理结果对吧？
没错，LEARNING里FetchClosedTrades获取closed trades，ProcessOutcomes处理结果，然后RecordMemory更新PortfolioMemoryEngine，最后把经验更新回WorkerNode。
LEARNING之后进入PERCEPTION，我理解这是感知当前市场状态的阶段。需要包含KillSwitchCheck来做风控检查？
是的，PERCEPTION里先FetchPortfolio获取组合情况，然后KillSwitchCheck检查P&L。如果在限制内就DailyReset重置交易计数，如果 breached 就直接HALT停机。
PERCEPTION结构完成了。正常路径到DailyReset后通知IngressController，异常路径到HALT。接下来是REASONING阶段？
对，REASONING是最复杂的。LoopAssets循环每个资产，AnalyzeAsset生成决策，有RetryLogic处理失败，用ExponentialBackoff重试。成功的话CheckAction判断是HOLD还是BUY/SELL。
我理一下：RetryLogic失败时走ExponentialBackoff，重试AnalyzeAsset；如果超过最大次数就MarkFailure跳过这个资产。CheckAction的BUY/SELL直接到IngressController，HOLD则NextAsset继续循环？
完全正确。所有资产处理完后回到LoadBalancer。REASONING有两个出口：有可执行动作时到RISK_CHECK，没有动作时直接回IDLE。
REASONING画好了。RISK_CHECK也是复合状态，GetMonitoringContext获取监控上下文，ValidateTrade由RiskGatekeeper审批，有Approved和Denied两个出口。
对，Approved进入EXECUTION，Denied回到PERCEPTION重新感知。EXECUTION里SendOrder执行交易，成功的话AssociateDecision关联决策，IncrementCounter更新TradeMonitor的daily_trade_count。
EXECUTION失败的情况呢？我看到有EXECUTION_FAILED状态。
SendOrder失败时LogFailure，进入EXECUTION_FAILED，然后回到PERCEPTION重试。EXECUTION成功的话进入LEARNING，形成闭环。
HALT状态我也补充一下：StopAgent设置is_running为False，最终状态指向RedisCache。
最后给各个状态加上颜色区分。STARTUP和POSITION_RECOVERY用青色，IDLE灰色，LEARNING绿色，PERCEPTION蓝色，REASONING橙色，RISK_CHECK黄色，EXECUTION紫色，HALT和EXECUTION_FAILED红色。
颜色都加上了。我检查一下整体流程：WorkerNode启动→恢复持仓→空闲等待→学习更新→感知市场→推理决策→风险检查→执行交易→回到学习，形成完整闭环。异常路径也都覆盖了。
有个细节，REASONING里的ExponentialBackoff和POSITION_RECOVERY里的RetryBackoff都是指数退避，但前者是重试AnalyzeAsset，后者是重试QueryPlatform，不要搞混了。
明白，两个指数退避的作用域不同，已经正确标注。整个状态机完成了，所有基础设施组件的交互也都体现出来了。
